# Johnny's Barbershop — Salem, OR
> Johnny's Barbershop is a barbershop in Salem, Oregon for fades, classic cuts, beard trims and hot-towel shaves. Bilingual (English/Spanish). 388 State St. Call (503) 510-8642.

## Services
- Haircuts & Fades
- Beard & Line-up
- Hot-Towel Shave
- Kids' Cuts
- Designs & Details

## Service area
- Salem, Keizer, West Salem, Marion County (ZIPs: 97301)

## Contact
- Call/text: (503) 510-8642 · Hours: Walk-ins & appointments — call for today's hours · Languages: English, Español

## FAQ
### How much is a haircut?
Pricing depends on the service &mdash; your barber confirms it before the cut, with shop rates posted in-store.

### Do you take walk-ins?
Yes &mdash; walk in during open hours, or book ahead to skip the wait.

### Do you do beard trims and shaves?
We do &mdash; beard shaping, line-ups and hot-towel straight-razor shaves.

### Do you cut kids' hair?
Absolutely &mdash; we keep it quick and patient for the little ones.

### Can I request a specific barber?
Yes &mdash; tell us who, or book directly with your barber.
